glosses.vi: sự truy đuổi; sự tiếp tục

sentences.target: On parle de la poursuite du projet.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la puʁsɥit dy pʁɔʒɛ/

translations.fr: On parle de la poursuite du projet.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la puʁsɥit dy pʁɔʒɛ/
translations.en: We’re talking about continuing the project.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de continuar el proyecto.
translations.de: Wir sprechen darüber, das Projekt fortzusetzen.
translations.it: Stiamo parlando di continuare il progetto.
translations.ko: 우리는 프로젝트를 계속하는 것에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在讨论继续这个项目。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度討論繼續呢個項目。
translations.pt: Estamos falando de continuar o projeto.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bàn về việc tiếp tục dự án.
translations.nl: We praten over het voortzetten van het project.
translations.hi: हम परियोजना को जारी रखने के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για τη συνέχιση του έργου.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om å fortsette prosjektet.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om att fortsätta projektet.
translations.da: Vi taler om at fortsætte projektet.
translations.ja: プロジェクトの継続について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (generic/colloquial ‘we’), 3rd person singular form used as grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, agreeing with ‘On’.
Preposition introducing a complement (‘de la poursuite’).
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘poursuite’.
Common noun, feminine; head of the prepositional complement ‘de la poursuite’.
Contracted form of preposition ‘de’ + definite article ‘le’, introducing a noun complement (‘du projet’).
Common noun, masculine; complement of ‘du’.

sentences.target: Il craint une poursuite pour tapage nocturne.
sentences.reading: /il kʁɛ̃ yn puʁsɥit puʁ tapaʒ nɔktyʁn/

translations.fr: Il craint une poursuite pour tapage nocturne.
translations.ipa: /il kʁɛ̃ yn puʁsɥit puʁ tapaʒ nɔktyʁn/
translations.en: He’s afraid of legal action for late-night noise.
translations.es: Teme una demanda por ruido nocturno.
translations.de: Er fürchtet eine Anzeige wegen nächtlicher Ruhestörung.
translations.it: Teme un'azione legale per rumori notturni.
translations.ko: 그는 야간 소음으로 법적 조치를 당할까 두려워한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他担心因为夜间噪音被起诉。
translations.yue: 佢驚因為夜晚嘈音畀人告。
translations.ru: Он боится судебного преследования за ночной шум.
translations.pt: Ele teme uma ação legal por barulho noturno.
translations.he: הוא חושש מתביעה על רעש לילי.
translations.tr: Gece gürültüsü yüzünden hukuki işlem görmekten korkuyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sợ bị kiện vì gây ồn vào ban đêm.
translations.ar: إنه يخشى دعوى قضائية بسبب الضجيج الليلي.
translations.nl: Hij is bang voor juridische stappen wegens nachtelijk lawaai.
translations.uk: Він боїться позову через нічний шум.
translations.hu: Fél attól, hogy éjszakai zaj miatt beperelik.
translations.hi: वह देर रात शोर के कारण कानूनी कार्रवाई से डरता है.
translations.pl: Obawia się pozwu za hałas w nocy.
translations.el: Φοβάται νομική δίωξη για νυχτερινό θόρυβο.
translations.nb: Han frykter rettslige skritt for nattestøy.
translations.id: Dia takut akan tindakan hukum karena kebisingan malam hari.
translations.sv: Han är rädd för rättsliga åtgärder på grund av nattligt oväsen.
translations.ro: El se teme de acțiuni legale din cauza zgomotului nocturn.
translations.cs: Bojí se právních kroků kvůli nočnímu hluku.
translations.da: Han er bange for retlige skridt på grund af natlig støj.
translations.fi: Hän pelkää oikeustoimia yöllisen melun takia.
translations.ja: 彼は深夜の騒音で訴えられるのを恐れている。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘poursuite’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘craint’ in legal sense.
Preposition introducing motive/ground (‘pour tapage nocturne’).
Common noun, masculine; head of the prepositional complement after ‘pour’.
Adjective modifying ‘tapage’, masculine singular, post-nominal.

sentences.target: La poursuite des travaux nous fatigue déjà.
sentences.reading: /la puʁsɥit de tʁavo nu fatiɡ deʒa/

translations.fr: La poursuite des travaux nous fatigue déjà.
translations.ipa: /la puʁsɥit de tʁavo nu fatiɡ deʒa/
translations.en: The ongoing work is already tiring us.
translations.es: La continuación de las obras ya nos cansa.
translations.de: Die anhaltenden Bauarbeiten machen uns schon müde.
translations.it: La prosecuzione dei lavori ci sta già stancando.
translations.ko: 공사가 계속되는 게 벌써 우리를 지치게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 持续的施工已经让我们很累。
translations.yue: 持續嘅工程已經令我哋好攰。
translations.pt: A continuidade das obras já está nos cansando.
translations.vi: Việc thi công tiếp tục đang khiến chúng tôi mệt mỏi.
translations.nl: De voortzetting van de werkzaamheden maakt ons nu al moe.
translations.hu: A munkálatok folytatása már fáraszt minket.
translations.hi: कामों का जारी रहना हमें पहले ही थका रहा है.
translations.el: Η συνέχιση των εργασιών μας κουράζει ήδη.
translations.nb: Fortsettelsen av arbeidet gjør oss allerede slitne.
translations.id: Kelanjutan pekerjaan sudah membuat kami lelah.
translations.sv: Fortsättningen av arbetet gör oss redan trötta.
translations.da: Fortsættelsen af arbejdet gør os allerede trætte.
translations.ja: 工事の継続で私たちはもう疲れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘poursuite’.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP.
Contracted form of preposition ‘de’ + definite article ‘les’, introducing the plural complement (‘des travaux’).
Common noun, masculine plural (irregular plural of ‘travail’); complement of ‘des’.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person plural, indirect/direct object here functioning as affected argument of ‘fatigue’.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject ‘La poursuite des travaux’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verbal predicate.

sentences.target: Je soutiens la poursuite de tes études.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sutjɛ̃ la puʁsɥit də tez etyd/

translations.fr: Je soutiens la poursuite de tes études.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sutjɛ̃ la puʁsɥit də tez etyd/
translations.en: I support the continuation of your studies.
translations.es: Apoyo que continúes con tus estudios.
translations.de: Ich unterstütze die Fortsetzung deines Studiums.
translations.it: Sostengo il proseguimento dei tuoi studi.
translations.ko: 나는 네가 학업을 계속하는 것을 지지해.
translations.pt: Eu apoio a continuidade dos seus estudos.
translations.vi: Tôi ủng hộ việc bạn tiếp tục học.
translations.nl: Ik steun het voortzetten van je studie.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी पढ़ाई जारी रखने का समर्थन करता हूँ.
translations.el: Υποστηρίζω τη συνέχιση των σπουδών σου.
translations.nb: Jeg støtter at du fortsetter studiene dine.
translations.sv: Jag stödjer att du fortsätter dina studier.
translations.da: Jeg støtter, at du fortsætter dine studier.
translations.ja: あなたが学業を続けることを応援します。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘poursuite’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘soutiens’.
Preposition introducing a possessive/complement phrase (‘de tes études’).
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular possessor, plural possessed; modifies ‘études’.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of ‘de’.
